name: Fat-Free Cranberry Orange Muffins (Ovo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray 12 (2-1/2-inch) muffin cups with cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a medium bowl, mix sugar and orange juice thoroughly using a wire whisk or fork.
5. Whisk egg whites into the mixture with Karo syrup and orange peel until well blended.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until smooth.
7. Fold in cranberries.
8. Pour batter into prepared muffin cups.
9. Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned and firm to touch.
10. Allow muffins to cool in pan for 5 minutes before serving warm or cooling completely on a wire rack. Store leftovers in an airtight container.
